name: Coverage: Rich event details description priority reminder
description: Create an event with description and priority; reopen and verify title plus description. Skip aggressive delete cleanup that can trap native confirms.

planSteps.description: Type demo@timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraDemo123! into the password field
Click Sign in and wait for the dashboard
Click the + Add Event button in the dashboard (not a random calendar slot)
Wait 2 seconds for the event dialog
Type TS Rich Details Event into the title field
In the Description field, type Agenda notes for TestSprite rich details
Set Priority to Important if a Priority select is visible
Click Save in the event dialog
Wait 4 seconds for the dialog to close and calendar to refresh
Verify TS Rich Details Event appears on the weekly calendar or Today Agenda
Click the calendar event titled TS Rich Details Event once to reopen the edit dialog
Verify the dialog title field shows TS Rich Details Event and the Description contains Agenda notes for TestSprite rich details
Click Cancel or Close to dismiss the dialog without deleting
